title: Pamela Chambers
compiled_truth: Pamela Chambers is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2001-11-16), Pamela Chambers sent 7 and received 22 emails, totalling 29 interactions. Top correspondents: [Howard Camp](people/howard-camp) (7), [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (7), [Rita Wynne](people/rita-wynne) (5), [Pat Clynes](people/pat-clynes) (5), [George Grant](people/george-grant) (4).
